name: Adjustable Hand Grip Trainer - All In Motion™: TPR & ABS Material, Hand & Finger Exercise
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Hand grip trainer is designed to keep your hands and fingers strong for sports and everyday life. Made from plastic with rubber handles for comfortable grip. Adjustable design allows you to train at the intensity of your choosing by changing the force required to squeeze the trainer.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
